posts.author: PatriciaSibinelli (Patricia Sibinelli)
posts.cookedHtml: I loved the predefined automation When Status change to something create an item in Board and connect them using a Board in this board, and it disapperead from predefined automation and also of possible customization options. I would like to emphasize that Master Board only works with this automation! Please return it!!! Thanks.
